title: Unobtainable Potions
description: adds potions that are for effects without one
body:
Adds potions for effects that dont have potions



The potions and the recipes

.levitation: Shulker Shell
.haste: Gold Pickaxe
.glowing: glow ink sac
.wither: wither rose
.darkness: Echo Shard
.blindness: Ink Sac
.dolphins grace: Heart of the Sea
.unluck: Skeleton Skull
.Mining Fatigue: Prismarine Shards
.Nausea: Rotten Flesh
